chain.thought: Explanation: Henry J. Kaiser has the earliest start year listed (1986–present), making it the first ship to become active.

judge_thought: Explanation: The table lists the "years active" for each ship. Henry J. Kaiser is shown as active from 1986–present, which is the earliest start date among all ships (others begin in 1987 or later, and two were never in service). Therefore, Henry J. Kaiser was the first to become active.
